species: Here we identify Mad3 as a substrate of fission yeast Mps1Mph1 kinase.
cell_type: Here we identify the checkpoint protein Mad3 as an important substrate...
disease_state: Defects in this checkpoint control lead to unequal segregation of DNA/chromosomes, termed aneuploidy...
